song_name: I Can Do It With A Broken Heart

versions.song_name: I Can Do It With A Broken Heart

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: I Can Do It With A Broken Heart

content:
* means hold chord


[Intro]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
 (he, he, he, he, he, he)[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
 I can read your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
 "She's having the time of her life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 There in her glittering prime[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                                                  [ch]C[/ch]
 The lights refract sequin stars off her silhouette every night"[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
 I can show you lies[/tab]

 (one, two, three, four)


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                            [ch]F[/ch]
 'Cause I'm a real tough kid. I can handle my shit[/tab]
[tab]                                                              [ch]C[/ch]
 They said, "Babe, you gotta fake it till you make it", and I did[/tab]

 "Lights, camera, bitch, smile, even when you wanna die."
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
 He said he'd love me all his life, but that life was too short[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F[/ch]
 Breaking down, I hit the floor[/tab]
[tab]                                                           [ch]C[/ch]
 All the pieces of me shattered as the crowd was chanting "More!"[/tab]
[tab]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
 I was grinning like I'm winning, I was hitting my marks[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]*                  [ch]C[/ch]
 'Cause I can do it with a broken heart[/tab]
             (one,  two,  three,  four)

[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 I'm so depressed I act like it's my birthday every day[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 I'm so obsessed with him, but he avoids me like the plague[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
 I cry a lot, but I am so productive; it's an art[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
 You know you're good when you can even do it .. with a broken heart[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
 I can hold my breath[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
 I've been doing it since he left[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 I keep finding his things in drawers[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
 Crucial evidence; I didn't imagine the whole thing I'm sure[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
 I can pass this test[/tab]

 (one, two, three, four)


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                            [ch]F[/ch]
 'Cause I'm a real tough kid. I can handle my shit[/tab]
[tab]                                                              [ch]C[/ch]
 They said, "Babe, you gotta fake it till you make it", and I did[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]C[/ch]*
 Lights, camera, bitch, smile, in stilettos for miles[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
 He said he'd love me for all time, but that time was quite short[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F[/ch]
 Breaking down, I hit the floor[/tab]
[tab]                                                           [ch]C[/ch]
 All the pieces of me shattered as the crowd was chanting "More!"[/tab]
[tab]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
 I was grinning like I'm winning, I was hitting my marks[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]*                  [ch]C[/ch]
 'Cause I can do it with a broken heart[/tab]
             (one,  two,  three,  four)


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 I'm so depressed I act like it's my birthday every day[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 I'm so obsessed with him, but he avoids me like the plague[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
 I cry a lot, but I am so productive; it's an art[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
 You know you're good when you can even do it .. with a broken heart[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                           [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
 You know you're good when you can even do it .. with a broken heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
 You know you're good[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm[/ch]
 And I'm good[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 'Cause I'm miserable[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
 And no one even knows![/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]*
 Try and come for my job[/tab]
